## Public Claim Reminder

Feature requests and roadmap ideas are not implemented functionality until source, tests, docs, and claim review support them. If this issue proposes or changes wording about privacy, anonymity, encryption, security, VPN, Tor, browser isolation, audit status, or release maturity, reference `docs/CLAIMS_REGISTER.md` and `docs/CLAIM_SAFE_WRITING.md`.
